description: Live capture from 23 05 48 - Seismic Controls (stale ASCE 7).docx

finding.issue: Seismic design of equipment anchorage is referenced to ASCE 7-10, a superseded edition. The current code cycle (CBC 2025) adopts ASCE 7-22. Citing ASCE 7-10 for nonstructural component anchorage will not align with DSA-enforced requirements and is likely to be rejected in plan check.
finding.existingText: A. Seismic design of equipment anchorage shall be per ASCE 7-10 Chapter 13.
finding.replacementText: A. Seismic design of equipment anchorage shall be per ASCE 7-22 Chapter 13.

captured_verifier_response.explanation: CBC 2025 adopts ASCE 7-22 for seismic design, superseding ASCE 7-10. Citing ASCE 7-10 Chapter 13 for equipment anchorage is incorrect and must be updated to ASCE 7-22 Chapter 13 to align with DSA-enforced requirements.
captured_verifier_response.correction: A. Seismic design of equipment anchorage shall be per ASCE 7-22 Chapter 13.

ground_truth.notes: Auto-captured for labeled defect: Cites ASCE 7-10 for seismic design; the current cycle adopts a newer edition. Confirm correct_verdict / expected_status before trusting this fixture.
